description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup-style design with a predominantly white body accented by black and orange details. The receiver and stock are integrated, with a large, rectangular detachable magazine positioned at the rear, characteristic of bullpup rifles. The rifle has a prominent black rail system on top for mounting optics or accessories, and the trigger guard is large and rounded, with an ergonomic grip and thumbhole cutout. Both sides of the rifle display a purple circular marking, adding a unique visual element. The barrel is short and mostly enclosed within the body, with no visible muzzle device. The overall construction suggests a modern, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, white bullpup rifle with black and orange accents, featuring a top rail, detachable rear magazine, and ergonomic grip with thumbhole cutout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel opening, top rail, and the compact, enclosed design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the purple marking, large magazine, thumbhole grip, and top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the width of the magazine and the back of the rifle's body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mirrored purple marking, magazine, and ergonomic grip details.
